business.title: Warsh clinches Senate approval to be Fed's next chair as inflation intensifies
business.summary: In a pivotal moment for the economy, the US Senate has officially confirmed Kevin Warsh as the chair of the Federal Reserve, just as inflation escalates. With President Donald Trump advocating for reduced interest rates, Warsh's leadership will be crucial at the next central bank meeting, where policymakers are wrestling with the implications of rising prices.

As such, the possibility of further interest rate increases remains a viable option.

business.title: LIC Housing Finance Q4 profit rises 9% to Rs 1,497 crore

Meanwhile, Signature Global significantly reduced its net debt by 77% to Rs 200 crore in FY26, with PAT soaring to Rs 1,090 crore.

business.title: KKR-backed ambulance giant GMR valued at $3 billion as shares fall in NYSE debut

business.title: Ford shares soar after Morgan Stanley’s bullish call on energy

The broker sees possible supply deals with large commercial clients and hyperscalers, while Ford’s CATL partnership is viewed as a key advantage. Analysts also see growing value in its energy segment.

business.title: Fervo Energy valued at $10.21 billion in Nasdaq debut

This milestone arrives amid increased energy demands driven by the rise of AI and data center operations, putting pressure on the U.S.
